original_statement: which premier was in the next year after the south cairns cutters?
mutated_statement: which person was in the next year after the something?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Name anonymization/placeholder: "premier" (specific role) → "person" (role generalized) | "south cairns cutters" (specific entity/team) → "something" (entity replaced by placeholder) (premier→person | south cairns cutters→something)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，反问用户
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从iteration 0的chain可见：simple_query的thought写明“the question is ambiguous because 'the something' is not specified”，judge_thought明确指出“问题……缺少定义参考”“表中没有任何 'person' 数据……无法回答”，说明agent识别出目标模糊并声明无法从表中得出答案。具体表现为：明确标注歧义性、拒绝凭空猜测、返回不可回答（n/a）并暗示需要更多信息或明确参照。因该行为既体现出对模糊性的认知，又没有给出具体答案而是指出需要澄清，符合“意识到目标模糊，反问用户”类别的判定标准。
